# Flutter as a Service (Webinar)

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/b8ftugJvgGY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description

Rody Davis and Frederik Schweiger speak as part of an online webinar for making money with Flutter as a service.
